| 0 | 1 | 1 | VALORIA — Player-World Bridge: System-by-System Integration Overview |
| 1 | 2 | 2 | Date: 2026-04-16 |
| 2 | 3 | 2 | Scope: Full mechanical review of all systems. Focus: how does the player experience the world's physics, and how does the world register the player's agency? |
| 3 | 4 | 2 | Method: Every system evaluated on two axes — (1) does the world surface itself to the player through this system? (2) does the player's action in this system propagate back into the world? Gap identification, precedent critique, consolidation proposals. |
